all.en: My sister and I had planned a long horror movie marathon for Friday night.
all.zh: 我和姊姊本來計畫週五晚上來一場長長的恐怖片馬拉松。

all.en: We made popcorn, ordered pizza, and dimmed all the lights in the living room.
all.zh: 我們爆了爆米花、叫了披薩，並把客廳的燈光調暗。

all.en: About twenty minutes into the first movie, the entire neighborhood went dark.
all.zh: 第一部電影大概放了二十分鐘，整個社區就一片漆黑。

all.en: At first, we thought a fuse had blown inside our apartment.
all.zh: 起初，我們以為是公寓裡的保險絲燒掉了。

all.en: However, looking out the window, every nearby building was also pitch black.
all.zh: 但是從窗戶望出去，附近每一棟大樓也都漆黑一片。

all.en: My sister joked that the movie had become unexpectedly interactive.
all.zh: 姊姊開玩笑說，這部電影意外地變得很有互動感。

all.en: We lit several candles and grabbed two flashlights from the kitchen drawer.
all.zh: 我們點了幾根蠟燭，從廚房抽屜拿出兩支手電筒。

all.en: Instead of the movie, we ended up telling each other old ghost stories.
all.zh: 我們最後沒看電影，反而互相講起小時候的鬼故事。

all.en: It was actually scarier than anything we had planned to watch.
all.zh: 這比我們原本要看的東西都還要恐怖。

all.en: The power finally came back around midnight, but we were too tired to continue.
all.zh: 電力終於在午夜時恢復，但我們已經太累了沒辦法繼續。

all.en: Honestly, the blackout turned out to be the best part of the evening.
all.zh: 老實說，這場停電反而成了當晚最棒的一段時光。

all.en: The next morning, my sister woke up still wrapped in her warm blanket.
all.zh: 隔天早上，姊姊醒來時仍裹在她那條暖暖的毛毯裡。

all.en: She declared that every Friday should now include at least one candlelit hour.
all.zh: 她宣布從今以後每個週五都應該至少要有一小時的燭光時光。

all.en: I checked the news and learned a substation had failed during a heavy storm.
all.zh: 我查看新聞，得知一場強烈暴風雨導致變電所故障。

all.en: Our neighbors gathered outside, chatting about who had the longest blackout.
all.zh: 鄰居們聚集在外面，閒聊誰家停電時間最久。

all.en: An elderly woman across the hall thanked us for sharing extra candles.
all.zh: 對門的一位老太太感謝我們分了幾根蠟燭給她。

all.en: My sister and I bought a small emergency kit at the hardware store later.
all.zh: 後來我和姊姊在五金行買了一個小型緊急應變包。

all.en: It included a flashlight, a radio, batteries, and a few portable chargers.
all.zh: 裡面有手電筒、收音機、電池，還有幾個行動電源。

all.en: We promised each other we would never feel scared during a blackout again.
all.zh: 我們答應彼此，以後再也不會因為停電而感到害怕。

all.en: That evening, we finally finished watching the horror movie we had started.
all.zh: 當晚，我們終於把之前沒看完的恐怖片看完了。

all.en: Honestly, real darkness had made the film feel much less frightening afterward.
all.zh: 老實說，真實的黑暗反而讓這部片之後顯得沒那麼可怕了。

all.en: A week later, the power company sent every household a small apology letter.
all.zh: 一週後，電力公司寄了一封小小的道歉信給每一戶人家。

all.en: They explained the repairs and offered a modest discount on the next bill.
all.zh: 信中說明了搶修過程，並提供下期電費小小的折扣。

all.en: My sister taped the letter to our fridge as a funny little souvenir.
all.zh: 姊姊把這封信貼在冰箱上，當成一個有趣的小紀念品。

all.en: We invited our elderly neighbor over for a proper movie night the following weekend.
all.zh: 下個週末，我們邀請對門那位老太太過來，一起好好辦一場電影之夜。

all.en: She brought homemade cookies and a thermos of warm ginger tea for everyone.
all.zh: 她帶了自製餅乾，還有一瓶熱薑茶分給大家喝。

all.en: During the film, she shared stories from typhoons during her younger years.
all.zh: 看片過程中，她和我們分享了她年輕時遇到颱風的故事。

all.en: Her tales were far more thrilling than any horror movie on our screen.
all.zh: 她講的故事比螢幕上任何恐怖片都還要驚心動魄。

all.en: My sister suggested making movie nights with her a monthly tradition together.
all.zh: 姊姊提議和她一起把電影之夜變成每月的固定活動。

all.en: She agreed cheerfully and promised to bring a different snack every time.
all.zh: 她欣然同意，並承諾每次都會帶不一樣的點心過來。

all.en: That blackout, I realized, had quietly stitched our small building together.
all.zh: 我體會到，那場停電悄悄地把我們這棟小公寓的人縫在了一起。

all.en: Winter came, and another small blackout hit our building during a windy evening.
all.zh: 冬天到了，又一次小停電在一個颳風的傍晚襲擊了我們的大樓。

all.en: This time, my sister and I felt absolutely prepared with our emergency kit.
all.zh: 這次，我和姊姊有了緊急包，感到完全準備就緒。

all.en: We quickly knocked on our elderly neighbor's door to check on her safety.
all.zh: 我們很快地敲了老太太家的門，確認她是否安全。

all.en: She invited us inside for ginger tea and freshly baked sweet potato cakes.
all.zh: 她邀請我們進屋，喝薑茶並品嚐剛烤好的地瓜餅。

all.en: Our movie night transformed into a candlelit storytelling session for three people.
all.zh: 我們的電影之夜，變成了三個人的燭光說故事時光。

all.en: She showed us a faded photo album from her wedding back in the sixties.
all.zh: 她拿出一本褪色的相簿，照片是她六零年代結婚時拍的。

all.en: My sister recorded her stories with quiet permission on her phone's voice memo.
all.zh: 姊姊在徵得同意後，用手機的錄音功能安靜地記錄下她的故事。

all.en: We later transcribed them into a small handmade booklet as a heartfelt gift.
all.zh: 我們後來把它們抄寫成一本小小的手工冊子，當作真摯的禮物。

all.en: She cried when we presented the booklet during her eighty-fifth birthday celebration.
all.zh: 我們在她八十五歲生日慶祝會上送出冊子時，她感動落淚。

all.en: Blackouts, we realized, kept revealing the brightest parts of our quiet building.
all.zh: 我們體會到，停電總是揭露出我們這棟安靜大樓中最明亮的部分。

all.en: Spring brought another long blackout caused by an unexpected windstorm one Friday evening.
all.zh: 春天來了，某個週五傍晚一場意外的風暴又造成了一次長時間停電。

all.en: This time, our entire small building gathered together in the quiet lobby downstairs.
all.zh: 這次，我們整棟小公寓的住戶聚集在樓下安靜的大廳裡。

all.en: My sister brought down the emergency kit and shared candles with three new families.
all.zh: 姊姊把緊急包搬下樓，分了蠟燭給三戶新搬來的家庭。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor arrived with a large pot of warm sweet potato soup.
all.zh: 對門的老太太端著一大鍋熱騰騰的地瓜湯來了。

all.en: Children sat in a small circle while she told stories about old typhoon nights.
all.zh: 小朋友圍坐成一個小圈，聽她講述以往颱風夜的故事。

all.en: My sister recorded everything quietly on her phone with her usual gentle permission.
all.zh: 姊姊一如往常地徵得同意，用手機悄悄錄下了一切。

all.en: A young father suggested forming an official building community group chat for emergencies.
all.zh: 一位年輕爸爸提議成立一個正式的大樓社區群組，以備緊急狀況。

all.en: Within a week, every household had joined and shared useful contact details together.
all.zh: 一週內，每一戶都加入並分享了實用的聯絡資訊。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor was officially named the honorary leader by unanimous warm vote.
all.zh: 老太太經過全體溫馨的全票通過，被正式封為名譽會長。

all.en: Blackouts, I realized again, kept knitting our quiet building closer and closer together.
all.zh: 我再次體會到，停電總是把我們安靜的大樓，越縫越緊密。

all.en: By summer, our community group chat had become an active daily hub for friendly conversation.
all.zh: 到了夏天，我們的社區群組已成為每日熱絡互動的友善天地。

all.en: Neighbors shared recipes, traded books, and offered weekend rides to the local farmers market together.
all.zh: 鄰居們交換食譜、共享書籍，並結伴提供週末前往當地農夫市集的順風車。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor proposed a monthly building potluck dinner held in the now-organized lobby.
all.zh: 對門的老太太提議每月在現已整理好的大廳辦一次社區百樂餐聚會。

all.en: Each family brought one dish from their hometown, and the dining table filled quickly with stories.
all.zh: 每戶都帶來一道家鄉菜，餐桌很快被各種故事填滿。

all.en: My sister and I prepared our grandmother's pineapple cake recipe for the very first potluck.
all.zh: 我和姊姊在第一次百樂餐時，做了奶奶的鳳梨酥食譜。

all.en: A new family from Vietnam shared spring rolls and taught everyone two new useful phrases.
all.zh: 新搬來的越南家庭分享了春捲，並教大家兩句實用的新片語。

all.en: Children played gently in one corner while adults exchanged contact details and weekly schedules.
all.zh: 孩子們在一角溫和地玩耍，大人們則交換聯絡資訊和每週行程。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor was crowned the honorary chef of every future monthly potluck dinner ahead.
all.zh: 對門的老太太被加冕為未來每月百樂餐的名譽主廚。

all.en: She blushed deeply and thanked us with a quiet bow, holding back small happy tears.
all.zh: 她深深地紅了臉，含著淡淡的喜悅淚水，靜靜地鞠躬致謝。

all.en: That blackout-born tradition has now lasted three years and welcomes every new family warmly inside.
all.zh: 那個源自停電的傳統，至今已延續三年，溫暖地歡迎每一個新家庭加入。

all.en: In our fourth year, the building committee decided to publish a small book of our potluck recipes.
all.zh: 到了第四年，大樓委員會決定出版一本小書，收錄我們百樂餐的食譜。

all.en: My sister designed the cover, featuring a single candle glowing softly against a dark blue sky.
all.zh: 姊姊設計了封面，畫著一支蠟燭在深藍夜空下溫柔地發光。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor's sweet potato soup recipe became the proud opening page of the cookbook.
all.zh: 對門老太太的地瓜湯食譜，成了食譜書驕傲的第一頁。

all.en: We printed one hundred copies and gifted them to every resident and former family member.
all.zh: 我們印了一百本，分送給每位住戶和曾經住過的家人。

all.en: Several families had moved away by then, but each received their copy in a careful package.
all.zh: 當時已有幾戶搬走，但每一戶都收到了精心包裝的一本。

all.en: One former resident drove three hours back just to attend our cookbook launch potluck party.
all.zh: 一位曾經的住戶開了三小時的車回來，只為了參加食譜的發行百樂餐。

all.en: She brought her teenage daughter who had grown up attending our monthly building tradition fondly.
all.zh: 她帶來了她那位從小參與我們每月社區傳統的青少年女兒。

all.en: The daughter shyly thanked our elderly neighbor for the soup she still craved on cold days.
all.zh: 女兒害羞地向老太太道謝，說她至今在寒冷的日子仍會想念那碗湯。

all.en: Our neighbor cried quietly and promised to send her a fresh batch by mail every winter.
all.zh: 老太太靜靜地流下了淚水，並承諾每年冬天都會郵寄一鍋新煮的湯給她。

all.en: That night, I realized one small blackout had quietly seeded warmth that would never go dark again.
all.zh: 那一晚我明白，一場小小的停電已悄悄播下不會再熄滅的溫暖種子。

all.en: Years later, the daughter moved abroad for college but mailed our neighbor postcards every cold season.
all.zh: 多年後女兒到國外念大學，但每個寒冷的季節都會寄明信片給我們的鄰居。

all.en: Each postcard described which country's soup recipe had reminded her most of that first power outage.
all.zh: 每張明信片都描述哪個國家的湯品最讓她想起那次第一次的停電。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor pinned the postcards above her stove, building a slow, colorful map of memory.
all.zh: 我們年長的鄰居把明信片貼在爐子上方，慢慢拼成一張色彩斑斕的記憶地圖。

all.en: When the daughter visited for winter break, she cooked five international soups in our shared kitchen.
all.zh: 女兒回國度寒假時，在我們共用的廚房裡煮了五道國際湯品。

all.en: Friends, neighbors, and even strangers crowded into the small dining room to taste them together.
all.zh: 朋友、鄰居甚至陌生人都擠進那間小餐廳，一同品嚐這些湯。

all.en: Our neighbor cried softly while tasting the daughter's version of her own beloved warm radish broth.
all.zh: 我們的鄰居一邊輕輕落淚，一邊品嚐女兒改編她最愛的暖白蘿蔔湯。

all.en: The two of them began co-writing a small soup cookbook focused on quiet, unhurried winter cooking.
all.zh: 她們倆開始共同撰寫一本小型湯品食譜書，主題是安靜而從容的冬日烹飪。

all.en: Local bookstores carried it during the holidays, and several copies sold out within only two weeks.
all.zh: 在地書店在節日期間販售這本書，幾家店在短短兩週內就售罄。

all.en: Proceeds funded a community kitchen workshop teaching young people how to cook during power outages.
all.zh: 收益資助一場社區廚房工作坊，教年輕人如何在停電時烹飪。

all.en: Every workshop ended with one shared bowl of warm radish broth, exactly as that very first night.
all.zh: 每場工作坊都以共享一碗溫暖的白蘿蔔湯結束，正如最初的那一夜。

all.en: Last weekend, my sister and I taught the workshop together for the first time since she became a mom.
all.zh: 上週末，我和姊姊自她當媽媽後第一次一起帶工作坊。

all.en: Her three-year-old daughter sat on a small stool stirring an empty pot with great serious focus.
all.zh: 她三歲的女兒坐在小凳子上，神情嚴肅地攪著一個空鍋子。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor, now ninety-two, watched from her usual chair holding a tiny wooden spoon to clap with.
all.zh: 我們九十二歲的老鄰居坐在她慣坐的椅子上看著，手裡拿著一支小木匙用來敲打喝采。

all.en: A new young couple from upstairs brought their own children to attend for the very first time.
all.zh: 樓上新搬來的年輕夫妻第一次帶孩子來參加。

all.en: The mother whispered she had read about our community in a magazine article her own mother had mailed her.
all.zh: 媽媽輕聲說她在一篇雜誌文章中讀到我們的社區——那本雜誌是她媽媽寄給她的。

all.en: I asked her where her mother lived now, and she said her mother had moved away ten years ago.
all.zh: 我問她媽媽現在住在哪裡，她說她媽媽十年前就搬走了。

all.en: Our elderly neighbor suddenly looked up and quietly asked the new mother her family name.
all.zh: 老鄰居突然抬起頭，輕聲問這位新媽媽的家族姓氏。

all.en: It turned out the new mother's mother had once lived in apartment 304 during the very first blackout.
all.zh: 原來這位新媽媽的母親，就是當年第一次停電時住在 304 室的住戶。

all.en: Both women cried quietly while the children stirred their imaginary soups beside the still-warm real one.
all.zh: 兩位女士靜靜地落淚，孩子們則在那鍋仍溫熱的真湯旁攪著他們想像中的湯。

all.en: Walking upstairs that night, I realized the blackout's gentle warmth had quietly found its way back home.
all.zh: 那晚走樓梯回家時，我體會到那場停電的溫柔光暈，已悄悄找到了回家的路。

all.en: We had been looking forward to this scary movie night all week.
all.zh: 我們整個禮拜都在期待這個恐怖電影之夜。

all.en: The screen suddenly went black right at the creepiest scene.
all.zh: 螢幕竟然在最恐怖的那一幕突然黑掉了。

all.en: At first we thought the movie itself had crashed.
all.zh: 起初我們還以為是電影本身當機了。

all.en: My sister grabbed my arm and refused to let go.
all.zh: 我妹妹抓著我的手臂，怎麼也不肯放開。

all.en: We fumbled around the drawers looking for some candles.
all.zh: 我們在抽屜裡摸索著找蠟燭。

all.en: The flickering flames made the room feel oddly cozy.
all.zh: 搖曳的燭火讓房間意外地變得很溫馨。

all.en: Instead of the film, we ended up telling ghost stories.
all.zh: 結果我們沒看電影，反而開始講起鬼故事。

all.en: The cold pizza still tasted great by candlelight.
all.zh: 在燭光下吃冷掉的披薩，依然美味。

all.en: Power came back two hours later with a loud hum.
all.zh: 電力在兩小時後伴著一聲嗡鳴恢復了。

all.en: Honestly, the blackout turned out to be the best part.
all.zh: 老實說，停電反而成了最棒的一段。
